private const string DefaultSenderConfigKey = "DIAErrorEmailSender";
private const string DefaultRecipientConfigKey = "DIAErrorEmailRecipients";
private const string ErrorLogType = "428910002";
private const string ProcessName = "DIA Ingestion";

_logger.LogError(
    exception,
    "DIA exception notification required. FailureType: {FailureType}, FileName: {FileName}.",
    failureType,
    fileName);

var request = new DiaExceptionNotificationRequest
{
    SendErrorEmail = true,
    LogError = true,
    LogErrorTitle = $"DIA exception notification required - {failureType}",
    LogErrorProcessName = ProcessName,
    ErrorEmailSubject = $"DIA exception notification required - {failureType}",
    ErrorEmailBody =
        $"A DIA exception occurred.{Environment.NewLine}" +
        $"FileName: {fileName}{Environment.NewLine}" +
        $"FailureType: {failureType}{Environment.NewLine}" +
        $"Error: {exception.Message}",
    SenderConfigKey = DefaultSenderConfigKey,
    RecipientConfigKey = DefaultRecipientConfigKey,
    LogErrorFormattedError = exception.ToString(),
    LogType = ErrorLogType
};

return NotifyAsync(
    request,
    exception,
    cancellationToken);
